title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 25 - 2017: 20K diameter circles in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder late at night on March 25, 2017, recapping a day spent tracing geographic distances using Google Earth for a project involving circles of increasing diameters (today's background is 20km). He also mentions wanting to engage with Jane Mayer's book 'Dark Money' in relation to wealth inequality, and discloses he got high right before filming, framing marijuana use as personal scientific research in support of legalization.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: uses cannabis intentionally before videos, framing it as scientific research to support legalization policy
implicitly pro-legalization; mocks Hillary Clinton's 'do more science first' deferral as a reason to keep doing personal research
interested in the topic and wants to connect Dark Money themes to his own ideas about wealth discrepancy

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, be like for March 25th. Jeepers. March just zoomed by. Uh-huh. So, uh, it's 3.18 in the morning, though, on the 26th, because I procrastinated today.

Um, what time did I get up? I think I've been getting up kind of late. I got up at like 11. And, um, I was doing, today, I think I was doing circles at the beginning of the day. Um, and, um, and then I got going on doing the distances.

And so, and so today's Saturday. So tomorrow, because I told myself, see what I can do as much as the finishing the Google Earth of the dimensions page in the weekend, because maybe I could finish it.

So we'll see how much I can do on tomorrow and tracing. So yeah, maybe I could trace the rest of the distances and then it would be done. And then the only thing to do after that would be the website part of it, the webpage part of it.
So that's fun. And I'm not half-assing it either. I'm doing like all of the distances. Like if it's a 25th, if it's like a marathon in Tokyo or whatever, on the island, it's like on a trail.
Like I'm tracing it on top of actually like imagining if they would do it in all the courses, I'd make the best ones, like coming out from the middle or across.
So, um, anyways, and my background is, uh, 10 kilometer right now. Um, no, yesterday was 10 kilometer. Today, this one is 20 kilometer background.
So, um, yeah. So how many more do I have? Let's just think. Today's 20 and then this tomorrow would be, um, 40, 80, no.
Yeah, yeah, yeah. 80, 160, 320, 640, 12, whatever, 5, 10, 20. That's like another week and a half.
Um, so I'm good. Like, okay. Um, you know, as in I don't have to think of any other background to put in. Um, I haven't made it yet though.
So, uh, I'll do that right after I do this video. Um, and, uh, let's think to that book, Dark Money by Jane Mayer.
And I want to, like, one thing I want to do as soon as I can. Oh, I think I want to try to maybe, um, I want to make a, uh, page from what I learned in the book and all the pictures and stuff.
Um, yeah. Cause it's kind of tied in with what I do. You know, if I talk about wealth discrepancy and the baddie billionaires, I could give more of a reason to divert it more into my ideas.
Um, the communistic communism. So, um, how many? I just got high. Like I just smoked a bunch of weed, so I'm super high right now.

I'm not normally in science. I am right now, but I actually do that in my videos. Like I make sure to get extra high right before the video, um, to help, you know, because I'm a scientist to help, um, donate my scientific research for the policymakers.

Because I remember Hillary Clinton said something about that. Like, do you want to legalize me? She's like, no, we should do more science. So I'll do the scientific research and then we can legalize it worldwide.
Um, so, uh, 420. Okay. That's long enough.
